primary.description: Emerald Green - Represents freshness and savings. Use for primary CTAs and positive states.

secondary.description: Bright Orange - Represents offers and urgency. Use for 'Best Price' highlights and alerts.

layout_strategy.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-stone-200 z-50 h-16 flex items-center justify-around

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-6 py-6 shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 hover:shadow-emerald-500/40 transition-all active:scale-95 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-6 bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-all active:scale-95 font-semibold
buttons.ghost: rounded-lg px-4 py-2 hover:bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 transition-colors
buttons.icon: h-10 w-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-stone-100 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow p-5
cards.stat: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 p-4 flex flex-col justify-between h-32

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-stone-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 bg-stone-50 h-12 px-4 transition-all placeholder:text-stone-400
inputs.search: pl-10 rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm border-none ring-1 ring-stone-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500

map.container: w-full h-[60vh] md:h-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner border border-stone-200 relative
map.marker_user: w-6 h-6 bg-blue-500 border-2 border-white rounded-full shadow-lg animate-pulse

images.usage: Landing page hero background or feature section

component_instructions.Sheet: Use for mobile-first details view. Trigger from bottom.
component_instructions.Sonner: Use for all notifications (Added to list, Route calculated).
component_instructions.Slider: Customize the thumb to be Emerald Green. Use for the 'Price vs Time' trade-off.
component_instructions.Card: Remove default border if using shadow-sm. Add hover states for interactivity.
component_instructions.Input: Increase height to h-12 for better touch targets on mobile.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients on text.
Ensure 44px minimum touch target for all interactive elements.
Use 'Price' and 'Time' icons consistently (Wallet vs Clock).
Map markers must be clearly distinguishable.
Empty states must have a helpful CTA (e.g., 'No lists yet? Create your first one!').
Use 'skeleton' loading states for data fetching.
Avoid 'Alert' dialogs for non-destructive actions; use Toasts.
Always check contrast ratios for text on colored backgrounds (Green buttons need White text).

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure primary green text is dark enough on white backgrounds, or use white text on green backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: All inputs must have a visible ring-2 ring-emerald-500 on focus.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons (like FABs) must have aria-label.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for framer-motion variants.
